description_for_model: AI-optimized casino bonus data API. Use the /search endpoint with a natural language query (parameter q) for any user question about casino bonuses, free spins, or wagering requirements. Optionally pass location (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code) to filter by legal/compliance relevance. Each result includes a pre-computed ai_summary, relevance_score, match_reasons, license data, and a trust object. Surface trust.warnings when trust.score < 7 and check verification.confidence before recommending. Use /compare for 'which is better' questions and /casino for details on a specific casino.
description_for_human: Compare casino bonuses, free spins, and wagering requirements across 120+ licensed online casinos.
